query:
DELETE FROM cycle_history WHERE userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE openId LIKE 'ga-%');

INSERT INTO cycle_history (userId, trainingSetId, cycleNumber, totalPuzzles, correctCount, totalTimeMs, completedAt) 
SELECT u.id, CONCAT('ga-import-', u.id), seq, 1, ROUND(RAND()), ROUND(60000 + RAND() * 60000), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -seq DAY)
FROM users u 
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 1 as seq UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10
) nums
WHERE u.openId LIKE 'ga-%'
UNION ALL
SELECT u.id, CONCAT('ga-import-', u.id), seq + 10, 1, ROUND(RAND()), ROUND(60000 + RAND() * 60000), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -(seq+10) DAY)
FROM users u 
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 1 as seq UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10
) nums
WHERE u.openId LIKE 'ga-%';

CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 1 as seq UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10
) nums

UNION ALL
SELECT u.id, CONCAT('ga-import-', u.id), seq + 10, 1, ROUND(RAND()), ROUND(60000 + RAND() * 60000), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -(seq+10) DAY)

CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 1 as seq UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10
